title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Cisco India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Cisco India
jsonLd.description:
Cisco India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cisco India:
Cisco India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India!
